message:
Deduplicate sqliteConnString into shared storage helper

Move duplicated sqliteConnString logic from doctor/ and doctor/fix/ into
internal/storage.SQLiteConnString, making both files thin wrappers. Add
//go:build cgo tags and nocgo stubs for non-CGO builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+//go:build !cgo
+
+package fix
+
+// sqliteConnString returns an empty string in non-CGO builds where SQLite is unavailable.
+func sqliteConnString(_ string, _ bool) string {
+	return ""
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+//go:build !cgo
+
+package doctor
+
+// sqliteConnString returns an empty string in non-CGO builds where SQLite is unavailable.
+func sqliteConnString(_ string, _ bool) string {
+	return ""
+}
